name: Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. Grate the Parmesan cheese and set aside.
2. With the chopping blade in place, puree the garlic cloves in olive oil. Allow to stand for 15 minutes.
3. Wash and dry the basil and parsley thoroughly.
4. Add the herbs to the olive oil mixture in the food processor or blender and puree.
5. Add the pignolias, grated cheese, and additional olive oil if needed.
6. Toss with favorite hot pasta.
